entry.title: Серія вебінарів у квітні
entry.content:
Ми зібрали добірку глобальних вебінарів від SAP на квітень — для тих, хто хоче глибше зануритись у хмарну трансформацію, AI, інтеграцію, управління даними та бізнес-процеси.

Від практичних deep-dive сесій до розмов з топ-експертами SAP — обирайте найцікавіші для вас сесії та реєструйтесь за лінками нижче.

⌚Час вказано за Києвом. Мова вебінарів — англійська.

SAP Cloud ERP — трансформація, інновації та AI

  • 7 квітня, 15:00 -16:00
    Understanding SAP Cloud ERP: Public Cloud Concepts &   Operating Model 
    Основи SAP Cloud ERP, її модель операцій в публічній хмарі, клієнтські приклади та модель безпеки.

  • 13 квітня, 10:00 - 11:00
    In-Depth with SAP Cloud ERP ERP HY1 - AI Innovations in Supply Chain Management
    Глибоке занурення в AI-можливості SAP Cloud ERP для Supply Chain. Огляд 5 сценаріїв використання: обробка сертифікатів якості (SAP Document AI), управління відставанням замовлень (SAP Joule), агент планування виробництва, створення сповіщень про технічне обслуговування та обробка надходження товарів — з демонстрацією системи та сесією Q&A.

  • 14 квітня, 15:00 -16:00
    Innovation, End to End Scope, and Standard Business Processes
    Огляд ERP, зокрема фінанси, закупівлі та продажі, найкращі E2E бізнес-процеси в SAP Cloud ERP, а також питання конфігурації та стандартизації. Як використання гнучкості допомагає в диференціації та як послідовність процесів може прискорити впровадження.

  • 16 квітня, 12:00 - 12:30
    Clean core. Upgrade ready. Built to innovate. Maximizing value with SAP Cloud ERP Private
    Як clean core стратегія допомагає ERP-системам адаптуватися швидше, впроваджувати ШІ та знижувати витрати на оновлення. Досвід Cimpress та Nippon Gases Europe.

  • 21 квітня, 15:00 -16:00
    Transforming to SAP Cloud ERP: Mindset, Method, and Momentum
    Найкращі практики для трансформаційних проектів, огляд SAP Activate для SAP Cloud ERP у публічній хмарі, аспекти міграції даних та управління змінами у стандартному хмарному середовищі. Поширені помилки та найбільш ефективні підходи.
    Спікер: Sadik Tekin, керівник взаємодії з клієнтами - SAP Cloud ERP.

  • 28 квітня, 15:00 -16:00
    SAP Business AI in SAP Cloud ERP
    Як SAP Business AI інтегровано в SAP Cloud ERP для забезпечення надійних прогнозних інсайтів, інтелектуальної автоматизації та контекстуальних рекомендацій в основних бізнес-процесах. Крім того, будемо розглядати поширені випадки використання AI в SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

SAP Business Data Cloud – Наступна ера бізнес-даних

  • 16 квітня, 17:00 - 18:00
    Breaking Down the SAP BDC Pricing Model
    Огляд метрик споживання SAP Business Data Cloud та інструмента SAP BDC Capacity Unit Estimator для обчислення потреб у ємнісних одиницях. Також буде представлена інформація з SAP for Me, яка допоможе зрозуміти, як отримати доступ до важливих даних для підписки та операційних рішень.

SAP BTP: архітектура, AI та управління хмарою

  • 14 квітня, 17:00 - 18:00
    Architect the Future: SAP BTP AI Best Practices: From Strategy to Implementation
    Функціональна та технічна реалізація AI на SAP Business Technology Platform, важливість цих практик, структуру для AI-випадків та релевантні шаблони для проектів. Проєктування, побудова та масштабування AI-рішень на SAP BTP з реальним бізнес-впливом.

  • 15 квітня, 14:30 - 15:30
    Transformation with Agentic Enterprise Automation
    Як SAP BTP та SAP Business Transformation Management разом забезпечують масштабну автоматизацію підприємства на базі ШІ. Дізнайтесь, як проектувати та керувати ШІ-агентами, вимірювати їх цінність і перейти від точкової автоматизації до наскрізної інтелектуальної трансформації процесів — з реальними прикладами.

  • 21 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    Govern your cloud deliveries with SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Cloud Transport Management.
    Останні покращення в SAP Cloud ALM та SAP Cloud Transport Management Service. Можливість редагування транспортних запитів у BTP, що дозволяє динамічно налаштовувати транспорти в режимі реального часу. 

  • 23 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    Inside SAP IT: How to Lead IT Through Constant Change – a talk with SAP’s CPIO Benni Blau
    Розмова з Dr. Benjamin Blau, Chief Process and Information Officer SAP: як SAP IT управляє одним з найскладніших технологічних ландшафтів у світі, що означає роль Customer Zero та як агентний ШІ змінює роботу IT. Без сценарію. Зсередини.

  • 28 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    SAP Cloud ALM for SAP BTP Operations - Latest news!
    Як SAP Cloud ALM for Operations покращує роботу SAP Business Technology Platform. Огляд та аналіз підтримки SAP BTP. Новини про стратегію та плани на майбутнє. 

Інтеграція

  • 23  квітня, 17:30 - 19:00
    Achieve Enterprise-grade Operations for SAP Integration Suite
    Сесія охоплює операційні моделі, управління та стандартизовані практики експлуатації SAP Integration Suite: централізований моніторинг, варіанти розгортання, автоматизоване управління та DevOps-механізми. Для архітекторів інтеграцій, власників платформ та операційних команд.

  • 28 квітня, 9:30 - 11:00
    Develop enterprise-grade AI Agents with SAP Build and SAP Integration Suite
    Як SAP Build та SAP Integration Suite разом забезпечують наскрізну агентну автоматизацію в SAP та не-SAP середовищах. Дізнайтесь, як поєднати low-code розробку з корпоративною інтеграцією для побудови надійних автоматизацій під управлінням ШІ-агентів. Жива демонстрація та реальні приклади клієнтів включені.

  • 28 квітня, 17:00 - 18:00
    SAP Integration Suite - Monthly Update April
    Дізнайтесь про оновлення SAP Integration Suite — iPaaS платформи для з'єднання хмарних та локальних процесів, застосунків і даних. У програмі: оновлення B2B, нові можливості Edge Integration Cell (файловий адаптер, OFTP2, хмарний конектор) та презентація нової розширеної редакції Enhanced Edition. А також — #AskAnythingIntegration сесія запитань та відповідей з експертами.

Процеси та трансформація з SAP Signavio

  • 23 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    Turning business transformation into a capability for competitive advantage: from fragmented initiatives to repeatable success
    Як подолати проблеми масштабування трансформацій та перетворити їх на конкурентну перевагу. Оцінка зрілості процесів: визначте прогалини в стратегії, процесах, даних і культурі за допомогою досвіду 1,000 лідерів. Створіть систему для вимірюваних результатів, швидшого впровадження та інновацій.

Підтримка, сервіс та розвиток

  • 7 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    Customer Interaction Center (CIC) Support SAP for Me: SAP for Me Release Updates Q1 2026
    Щоквартальний вебкаст про останні оновлення та нові функції SAP for Me. Огляд змін з попереднього релізу, поточні проєкти та збір відгуків від учасників. 

  • 14 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    SAP's new Service Portfolio - Unleash your full potential with Success Plans
    Як Success Plans допомагають максимізувати цінність ваших SAP-рішень через персоналізовану підтримку та безперервний розвиток.

  • 15 квітня, 11:00 - 12:00
    Global HR, Local Compliance - Unlocking Localization in SAP SuccessFactors
    Як SAP SuccessFactors поєднує стандартизовані глобальні HR-процеси з локальними регуляторними вимогами. Локалізовані версії для розрахунку зарплати, управління часом та core HR, понад 800 законодавчих оновлень на рік. Завершення — жива сесія Q&A.

  • 15 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    Unlocking Transformative Value with the Advanced Success Plan
    Дізнайтесь, як Advanced Success Plan допомагає повністю розкрити потенціал ваших SAP-рішень та досягти вимірюваних бізнес-результатів.

  • 16 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    Achieving Strategic Excellence with the Max Success Plan
    Стратегічне партнерство та підтримка виділених експертів: наскрізний консалтинг для оцінки нових можливостей, управління складними трансформаціями та досягнення конкурентної переваги.

Переходьте за посиланнями, реєструйтесь та додавайте події до календаря — квітень це чудова можливість прокачати знання, отримати інсайти від експертів та бути в курсі найновіших рішень SAP.

entry.title: SAP Community Voice: AI into UI5, SAP Sapphire tips and New Enhancements based on your feedback!
entry.content:
April has just started, and with the new season comes some very exciting news for our SAP Community!

From practical ways to bring AI directly into SAPUI5 and automate deployments in SAP Integration Suite, to ETL best practices in SAP Datasphere, there’s a lot to explore in today’s edition. And, beyond the technical side, we also have announcements about new SAP Community website enhancements. Spoiler: most of these updates were shaped by your feedback, so we’re sure you will appreciate them!

Need tips on building your SAP Sapphire agenda? Or looking for recommendations on local SAP community meetups? We’ve got you covered with a full list of upcoming April events happening around the world.

Let’s dive in!

Featured Blog Posts 

AI into SAPUI5 as reusable controls 

SAP Mentor Wouter Lemaire, published a very interesting approach in his latest blog post, exploring how AI can be embedded directly into SAPUI5 controls through a reusable library. Instead of focusing on complex AI agents, he brings AI closer to where users interact daily, enabling simple tasks like text improvement, translation, or spell checking directly inside UI5 apps using standard data binding-without requiring developers to manage AI infrastructure. The post walks through the available controls, architecture, and design decisions, showing how this lightweight and practical approach can make AI integration more accessible and effective for everyday SAP use cases. 

Read Wouter Blog post here 

UI5 Plugins for Claude 

SAP Product and Topic Expert Florian Vogt introduced the new UI5 plugins for Claude and how to bring AI-powered development directly into SAPUI5 and OpenUI5 workflows. Designed to enhance developer productivity, these open-source plugins enable Claude Code to understand UI5-specific patterns, APIs, and best practices providing more accurate and context-aware assistance without relying on generic AI knowledge. The initial release includes a plugin for general UI5 development support, and another focused on TypeScript migration, helping developers create projects, fix errors, and modernize applications with confidence. If you're working with UI5 and exploring AI-assisted development, this is definitely one to check out. 

Read Florian Blog post here  

SAP Integration Suite automatic deployments using Ansible 

In this practical blog post, SAP Community member Marian Vatafu shared how to automate deployments in SAP Integration Suite using Ansible, reducing manual effort and minimizing human errors across environments. By defining deployment steps once in a YAML instruction file, developers can automatically handle tasks like credential creation, certificate management, artifact deployment, and configuration updates across DEV to PROD. The solution integrates tools like ServiceNow, GitHub, and Jenkins to ensure full traceability, auditability, and secure handling of sensitive data through Ansible Vault. With this approach, teams can streamline operations, improve consistency, and confidently manage complex integration landscapes with significantly less manual work.  

Read Marian Blog post here  

SAP Datasphere: Extract, Transform & Load (ETL)   

SAP Product and Topic Expert Jeet Kapase shared in his last blog post a guide on best practices for implementing ETL (Extract, Transform & Load) processes in SAP Datasphere, helping data engineers choose the right approach based on performance, scalability, and business needs. The post breaks down the available features-such as Replication Flow, Transformation Flow, Data Flow, and Open SQL Procedures, and explains when to use each one, highlighting SAP's recommendation to prioritize Replication and Transformation Flows for most scenarios. With clear comparisons, real performance insights, and practical guidance, this is a valuable read for anyone looking to design efficient, future-ready data pipelines in SAP Datasphere. 

Read Jeet Blog post here 

Community News 

SAP Community Enhancements  

April started with great news for our SAP Community users, as we have just launched new enhancements to make the experience navigating even better. 

  • Dark Mode:   Dark Mode is now live as the Beta Phase is complete! Last year, after listening to your feedback, we launched Dark Mode in beta, giving you the chance to choose your preferred visual experience. Since then, you have shared suggestions on how to make this feature more polished and seamless. With that in mind, we are happy to introduce the following improvements:

1. Light/Dark Mode Toggle -  A new toggle replaces the temporary text-based switch, making it easier to switch between themes for a more personalized browsing experience. 

2. Dark Mode Improvements for DSA Reporting Form -  The "Report Inappropriate Content" form has been updated to ensure all table content is visible and readable in dark mode. Previously unreadable white-on-white elements now follow the correct dark theme styling. 

 

  • Improved Recent Activity Filters: Now the Recent Activity feed filters on the Community landing page (Most Viewed, Most Commented, Most Liked) show results from the last 30 days, making content discovery more relevant. When you filter for most commented, for example, it only shows the most commented posts from the last 30 days. This makes it nicer and easier to find relevant content. 

 

  • Removal of ‘Users Online’ Homepage Stats: The “Online Members” statistic has been removed from the homepage to simplify the layout and reduce noise, helping users focus on key community conte

Before:

After:

Events 

SAP Sapphire 2026 

Are you planning to attend the SAP Sapphire 2026? This huge event is where SAP makes big announcements about its vision for the future of ERP and business applications. This includes showing new products, presenting customers who have transformed their business using SAP’s solutions, and highlighting new technologies that will shape the future. With so many great speakers and topics, choosing the sessions to attend sometimes can be overwhelming. To help you, SAP Product and Topic Expert Peter Spielvogel, published a blog post with his AI and UX sessions agenda selections. We highly recommend checking out, because he shared a very diverse agenda with an amazing selection of speakers! 

Read Peter Blog post here  

April upcoming Events: 

Talking about planning, have you selected any community driven events to attend this month? Any meetups with your local SAP community group?  In case not, we have got you covered! 

Check the list of the events that are already available on our Events page for you to sign up. There are opportunities all over the world: 

 SAP Stammtisch Wien - 09.04.2026 - SAP Community 

SAP Inside Track Campinas - 11.04.2026 - SAP Community 

SAP Meetup at UATE- 15.04.2026 - SAP Community 

Katowice - SAP Stammtisch 15.04.2026 - SAP Community 

SAP Community Meetup Lisbon - 16.04.2026- SAP Community 

SAP Inside Track Madrid 2026 - 17.04. 2026 - SAP Community 

SAP Stammtisch Wroclaw - 17.04.2026 - SAP Community 

Networking Meetup Dublin - 21.04.2026 - SAP Community 

Basel-Freiburg Stammtisch - 23.04.2026 - SAP Community 

SAP Women Walk & Talk São Paulo- 25.04.2026 - SAP Community

entry.title: Hello SAP Community! My name is Appikatla Venkata Murali Krishna
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

My name is Appikatla Venkata Murali krishna, and I am currently an aspiring SAP MM Consultant. I have completed my studies and have been actively building my skills in SAP S/4HANA with a focus on Materials Management (MM).

I have worked on real-time scenarios like procurement processes, freight vendor integration, and inventory management, which helped me understand how businesses manage materials efficiently using SAP. I am passionate about learning new SAP technologies and improving my functional knowledge to grow in this field.

As part of the Hello SAP Community Initiative, I’m excited to share my experience. You can read more about the initiative in Hello SAP Community Initiative , which gives the full background and context.

What is your professional life dream?

My professional dream is to become a successful SAP MM Consultant working on global implementation projects. I aim to contribute to organizations by optimizing procurement processes and improving supply chain efficiency using SAP solutions.

What do you imagine is the future of your topic (SAP, AI, Cloud)?

I believe the future of SAP lies in AI and Cloud integration. SAP S/4HANA Cloud combined with AI will automate procurement, predict demand, and optimize supply chains. As an SAP MM professional, I am excited to be part of this transformation.

What is your hobby?

My hobbies include learning new technologies, exploring SAP scenarios, and improving my technical knowledge. I also enjoy watching tech-related content and staying updated with industry trends.

What was the most fun project you ever participated in and why?

One of the most interesting projects I worked on was Freight Vendor Integration in SAP MM. In this project, I learned how to configure condition types like FRB1, manage multiple vendors (material and freight), and handle invoice verification. It was fun because it connected real-world logistics with SAP configuration.

What do you enjoy most in your studies/work and why?

What I enjoy most is understanding real-time business processes and configuring them in SAP. It is exciting to see how a business requirement is translated into a system solution. Especially in SAP MM, I enjoy working on purchase orders, inventory, and vendor management.

My SAP TechEd Bangalore Experience

This year, I had the opportunity to attend SAP TechEd Bangalore 2025, which was an amazing learning experience for me. It was my first time participating in such a large SAP event, and it gave me exposure to the latest innovations in the SAP ecosystem.

During the event, I attended multiple sessions related to SAP S/4HANA, AI integration, and cloud technologies. I also explored how SAP is transforming business processes using intelligent technologies.

One of the best parts of TechEd was the opportunity to connect with SAP experts, professionals, and fellow learners. It helped me understand real-world industry expectations and motivated me to improve my skills further.

Overall, SAP TechEd was an inspiring experience that strengthened my interest in SAP and gave me clarity about my career path.

And now let’s hear from you!

Where do you see yourself in 5 years?

I would love to hear your thoughts and experiences please share them in the comments!

entry.title: Somos Comunidade SAP Curitiba – Fabiele Boico
entry.content:
Este post faz parte da série  “Somos SAP Community Curitiba”, criada para compartilhar histórias de pessoas que ajudam a construir e fortalecer o ecossistema SAP em nossa cidade.

A ideia da série foi apresentada neste post de abertura:  Introdução - Série da comunidade: Somos SAP Community Curitiba

A proposta é simples: responder algumas perguntas e contar um pouco da nossa jornada dentro da comunidade.

Fui convidada por @SimoneAzevedo para participar da série e compartilhar um pouco da minha jornada no ecossistema SAP. Você pode conferir o post dela aqui:  Somos SAP Community Curitiba – Simone Azevedo - SAP Community   


🚀Quem sou eu na Comunidade SAP Curitiba?

Eu sou aquela que 'deu o match' perfeito com a Simone e acabou sendo fisgada por esse ecossistema fantástico! Brincadeiras à parte, hoje atuo como Head de Marketing na CVA . Entrei na comunidade de mansinho e acabei virando fã de carteirinha (e patrocinadora oficial em nome da CVA!). Estar presente em eventos como o SAP Inside Track Curitiba e o SAP Talk Women foi um divisor de águas; não foi apenas marketing, foi um 'achado' que já faz parte da história oficial da CVA. Estamos em casa!

❤️O que mais me motiva a continuar fazendo parte da SAP Community Curitiba?

O que me mantém aqui é uma troca real . No marketing, falamos muito sobre conexões, mas aqui na SAP Community a gente vive isso na prática. É a energia de compartilhar conhecimento, as conversas de corredor que viram insights valiosos e, claro, ver que sempre tem alguém disposto a ajudar. É impossível não querer voltar para o próximo evento!

✨Como fazer parte da comunidade impactou minha jornada profissional ou pessoal?

Profissionalmente, você ganha uma visibilidade incrível e um reconhecimento que só uma comunidade unida proporciona. Pessoalmente? Tem sido um deslumbre! Eu vim de outras áreas e, para mim, o ‘universo SAP’ ainda brilha como novidade. Me sinto em um eterno aprendizado com brilho nos olhos. Sou imensamente grata por esse recomeço e por ter mentores e parceiros de jornada como o Juliano Kisielewicz, o Jean Struck , o Rodrigo Okita Yamamoto e o Edson Alves . Sem eles, essa aventura não seria tão rica!

SAP Inside Track 2025 - Time CVASAP Talk Women 2026

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

❓Que conselho você daria para quem está começando agora no ecossistema SAP e ainda não conhece a comunidade?

Não tenha medo do novo. O ecossistema SAP é gigante, mas a comunidade Curitiba é o quintal onde a gente aprende a jogar junto. Venha pelo conhecimento, fique pelas pessoas!

🌐Conecte-se comigo:  https://www.linkedin.com/in/fabiele-cristine-boico-2473a529/

 

💫Convidados para continuar a série


Para continuar a série Somos SAP Community Curitiba, convido:  @Ironcva2025, @Lucas_Alberto e @Asafe_Ferraz-00 para compartilharem suas história e experiências na comunidade.

Além das perguntas da série:
1.  Quem sou eu na SAP Community Curitiba?
2.  O que mais me motiva a continuar fazendo parte do SAP Community Curitiba?
3.  Como fazer parte da comunidade impactou minha jornada profissional ou pessoal?

Deixo também a pergunta adicional: 

Que conselho você daria para alguém que está começando agora no ecossistema SAP e ainda não conhece a comunidade?

 

Frase final

E assim sigo, com o coração grato e a mentalidade sempre pronto para o próximo evento. A Simone abriu as portas, eu entrei com tudo, e agora quero saber: quem é o próximo a contar sua história? ✨

 

#SomosSAPCommunityCWB
#SAPCommunityCWB
#SAPCommunity

entry.title: SAP Developer News for April 9th, 2026
entry.content:
ITEMS 

Code Connect event tickets available from 16 Apr 

  • Code Connect website https://code-connect.dev/ 

On-location update from the SAP CodeJam Roadshow in Brazil 

  • SAP CodeJam Roadshow 2026 - Brazil edition (blog post) https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-blog-posts/sap-codejam-roadshow-2026-brazil-edition-kicking-off-in-march-and/ba-p/14317926  

SAPUI5 news - "The Art and Science of SAPUI5 in SAP Build" on 15 Apr plus Road Map updates 

  • Event information https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions/the-art-and-science-of-sapui5-in-sap-build 
  • Road Map info https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800001361&range=CURRENT-LAST#Q2%202026  

New Expert Session series on CAP Node.js with Daniel Schlachter 

  • Expert session series playlist https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQDxW_6INTtprrvZ3WiXT8u5 

DYK #11 - AI agents (Generative AI Hub & LangGraph) 

  • CrewAI example connecting to Sap Generative AI Hub via LiteLLM https://sap-contributions.github.io/litellm-agentic-examples/_notebooks/examples/crewai_litellm_lib.html  

CHAPTER TITLES  

00:00 Intro 
00:07 Code Connect event tickets available from 16 Apr 
01:01 On-location update from the SAP CodeJam Roadshow in Brazil 
01:54 SAPUI5 news - “The Art and Science of SAPUI5 in SAP Build" on 15 Apr plus Road Map updates 
02:42 New Expert Session series on CAP Node.js with Daniel Schlachter 
03:22 DYK #11 - AI agents (Generative AI Hub & LangGraph) 

TRANSCRIPT

This is the SAP Developer
News for April 9th, 2026.

[DJ]
The number one developer event annually is coming up soon in the SAP calendar. That's Code Connect. It's in July, but the tickets for all the events within Code Connect go on sale on the 16th of April. That's coming up very soon. so that's tickets for the CodeJams and also the individual conferences so there are four CodeJams all together OpenUI5, CAP AI Agents and HANA AI and there's UI5con of course reCAP and HANA Tech Con, three individual one-day conferences as well each event is ticketed all the tickets are free, and the tickets go on sale, quote-unquote, 16th April. See you there.

[Rich, Thiago, Alessandra, Bruno and Antonia]
Hey, friends. Rich Heilman here, and I'm joined by Thomas Young behind the camera. And we're here in Sao Paulo, Brazil at the SAP offices, and we're doing an SAP CodJam today on Joule for Developers, ABAP Developers, having a lot of fun getting through the exercises. Once we go back, I'll show them some more fun stuff. And yeah, it's been a great time so far. And here's the rest of my friends from Brazil. What's up folks! There you are in the second part of the CodeJam Roadshow here in Brazil and Ale talks a little more. So, yesterday and today we are in São Paulo and tomorrow we will be in Londrina, Paraná. And in the coming days as well ... This Friday we're going to have two simultaneous events, one in Curitiba and the other in Ribeirão Preto. And after that, we will meet on Saturday in Campinas for the SAP Inside Track. Come join us.

[Tom]
Friend of the show, Oliver Graeff, recently posted about an upcoming free webinar called The Art and Science of SAPUI5 in SAP Build. This webinar on April the 15th, which we've offered twice that day to accommodate more time zones, We'll cover information about how to develop SAPUI5, Fiori, and all things UI inside the SAP Build environment. So if you're interested, check out the registration information and all the other details in the show notes. And while we're on the subject of user interfaces, Oliver also posted about recent updates to the UI5 and Fiori Roadmap Explorer. So what a better way to prepare for the upcoming webinar than to check out all the latest that's been published in the Roadmap Explorer.

[DJ]
We just wanted to let you know that there's a recent new series an expert session series over on the SAP Developers YouTube channel the topic is CAP Node.js and we have special guest Daniel Schlachter from the CAP enablement team there are three episodes so far you can watch the replays of those and subscribe to get notifications for the upcoming episodes in this series. See you online Fridays at the usual time in the chat for these expert session Premieres.

[Nora]
Did you know that you can use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to build state-of-the-art AI agents with LangGraph? Now the cool thing is that AI Foundation has a lot of integrations with langchain. Now I'm going to show you how that works using the Python SDK. So up here you can see that I'm using the create_react_agent which is a pre-built AI agent from LangGraph and instead of using LangGraph to initialize the models as well, I'm going to use the Gen AI Hub SDK to initialize a model in a way that the LangGraph agent is going to understand it. So now over here you can see that I am here initializing my model. You can use any of the over 40 models that we have available in Generative AI Hub to power your agent here. So this is going to be your agent's brain, right? And then down here, when I actually initialize the actual create_react_agent from LangGraph, I'm going to hand over the LLM that I just initialized using Generative AI Hub. And then you can hand over any tools that you like. So here I'm, for example, using Playwright browser tools so that my agent can access the browser. But you can really use any tools you want and add them to your LangGraph agent here and try it out.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track NRW [Registration]
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

the agenda is complete, and we're moving into the second phase of preparations for the SAP Inside Track NRW (North Rhine-Westphalia).

SAP CodeJam

On June 12th, we'll kick things off with an SAP CodeJam at UNIORG (Lissaboner Allee 6-8, 44269 Dortmund) on the topic of “Latest ABAP Cloud and RAP Features”. You can find more information about the content and registration in the [SAP Community].

SAP Stammtisch

On the evening of June 12th, there will be an SAP Stammtisch in cooperation with Dortmund, Düsseldorf and Cologne. We invite all SAP CodeJam participants, as well as anyone interested, to join us. It starts at 6:00 PM at the Hövels Brewery (Hoher Wall 5-7, 44137 Dortmund) in Dortmund. We've reserved a separate room to foster a good atmosphere and encourage networking among all SAP colleagues.

SAP Inside Track

The SAP Inside Track itself starts on June 13th at adesso (Freie-Vogel-Straße 383, 44269 Dortmund) at 9:00 AM. You can find more details about the agenda and planned presentations below.

entry.title: Somos Comunidade SAP Curitiba – Iron Aparecido Lopes
entry.content:
Este post faz parte da série “Somos SAP Community Curitiba”, criada para compartilhar histórias de pessoas que ajudam a construir e fortalecer o ecossistema SAP em nossa cidade.

A ideia da série foi apresentada neste post de abertura: 🎙️ Série da comunidade: Somos SAP Community Curit... - SAP Community

A proposta é simples: responder algumas perguntas e contar um pouco da nossa jornada dentro da comunidade.

Fui convidado por @Fabiele para participar da série e compartilhar um pouco da minha jornada no ecossistema SAP. Você pode conferir o post dela aqui: Somos Comunidade SAP Curitiba – Fabiele Boico - SAP Community

 

👤Quem sou eu na SAP Community Curitiba?

 

Sou Iron Aparecido Lopes, consultor SAP, com foco principal no módulo PP, e atualmente também dedicado ao aprendizado do SAP SD. Estudo e pratico SAP nos ambientes ECC, S/4HANA e Cloud, buscando entender os processos de forma integrada, do negócio à execução no sistema.

Faço parte da CVA Consultoria, empresa onde tenho aprendido diariamente, tanto na parte técnica quanto na forma de enxergar projetos SAP de maneira estruturada e prática. Ter esse ambiente de aprendizado, aliado à troca com outros profissionais, tem sido fundamental na minha evolução.

Também tive a oportunidade de participar do SAP Inside Track Curitiba 2025, junto com o Time CVA, o que reforçou ainda mais meu interesse em estar presente, aprender e me conectar com a comunidade local.

 

 

🔥O que mais me motiva a continuar fazendo parte da SAP Community Curitiba?

 

O que mais me motiva é a troca aberta de conhecimento. A comunidade mostra, na prática, que aprender SAP não precisa ser um caminho solitário. Sempre existe alguém disposto a compartilhar uma experiência, uma dica ou até um erro que já viveu, e isso acelera muito o aprendizado de quem está começando.

Além disso, ver profissionais de diferentes níveis participando ativamente, seja em eventos, posts ou conversas, cria um ambiente seguro para aprender, perguntar e evoluir.

 

 

🚀Como fazer parte da comunidade impactou minha jornada profissional ou pessoal?

 

A SAP Community Curitiba tem sido importante principalmente como direcionamento e inspiração. Acompanhar histórias reais, eventos como o SAP Inside Track Curitiba e a participação ativa das pessoas da comunidade ajuda a entender melhor o ecossistema SAP e onde é possível chegar com dedicação e estudo.

Mais do que aprendizado técnico, a comunidade reforça algo essencial: ninguém se desenvolve sozinho. Esse sentimento de pertencimento e de aprendizado coletivo faz toda a diferença, especialmente para quem está em fase de construção de carreira.

A comunidade cumpre exatamente o que se propõe: conectar pessoas, compartilhar conhecimento e fortalecer o ecossistema SAP local.

 

SAP Inside Track 2025

 

SAP Inside Track 2025

 

 

 

 

❓Que conselho você daria para quem está começando agora no ecossistema SAP e ainda não conhece a comunidade?


Aceite que o início faz parte do processo. No ecossistema SAP, ninguém começa sabendo tudo, e a comunidade existe justamente para isso. Participar da SAP Community Curitiba ajuda a entender melhor os caminhos possíveis, aprender com experiências reais e perceber que dúvidas são normais, principalmente no começo.
A comunidade é um espaço para perguntar, observar, trocar e evoluir no seu ritmo. Para quem está aprendendo SAP, isso faz toda a diferença.

Conecte-se comigo: https://www.linkedin.com/in/iron-lopes

 

🔁Convidado para continuar a série

 

Para continuar a série Somos SAP Community Curitiba, convido: @LeandroCSantos para compartilhar sua história e experiências na comunidade.

 

Além das perguntas da série:
1.  Quem sou eu na SAP Community Curitiba?
2.  O que mais me motiva a continuar fazendo parte do SAP Community Curitiba?
3.  Como fazer parte da comunidade impactou minha jornada profissional ou pessoal?

 

Deixo também a pergunta adicional:

 

Que conselho você daria para alguém que está começando agora no ecossistema SAP e ainda não conhece a comunidade?

 

Frase final

 

Sigo aprendendo, e a SAP Community tem sido uma grande ajuda nesse caminho. Agora, quem é o próximo a contar sua história?
 
 
#SomosSAPCommunityCWB
#SAPCommunityCWB
#SAPCommunity

entry.title: Somos SAP Community Curitiba – Luiz Souza
entry.content:
Este post faz parte da série “Somos SAP Community Curitiba”, criada para compartilhar as histórias das pessoas que ajudam a construir e fortalecer o ecossistema SAP na nossa cidade.

A ideia da série foi apresentada neste post de abertura:
  Introdução - Série da comunidade: Somos SAP Community Curitiba

A proposta é simples: responder algumas perguntas e contar um pouco da nossa jornada dentro da comunidade.

😎Quem sou eu na SAP Community Curitiba?
Sou Luiz Souza, Sou desenvolvedor raiz desde 2003 e atualmente focado em sap invovação e tecnologia e Clean Core. E também sou curador da SAP Community Curitiba, atuando na organização e condução de iniciativas que conectam profissionais, promovem aprendizado contínuo e fortalecem o ecossistema SAP local. Tenho um papel ativo na criação de experiências como eventos, encontros técnicos, sempre buscando gerar valor real para a comunidade.

🤔O que mais me motiva a continuar fazendo parte da SAP Community Curitiba?
O que mais me motiva é o impacto direto nas pessoas. Ver profissionais evoluindo, compartilhando conhecimento e se conectando através da comunidade é algo extremamente gratificante. Além disso, a troca constante com especialistas e a oportunidade de estar próximo das inovações da SAP, como BTP, Clean Core e IA, me impulsionam a continuar contribuindo.

💎Como fazer parte da comunidade impactou minha jornada profissional ou pessoal?
Fazer parte da comunidade teve um impacto significativo na minha jornada. Profissionalmente, fortaleceu minha posição como referência em temas como SAP BTP, extensão e integração, além de ampliar meu networking com profissionais do Brasil e do exterior. Pessoalmente, desenvolvi habilidades de comunicação, liderança e confiança — especialmente ao conduzir eventos, inclusive em inglês — e vivi experiências marcantes que elevaram meu nível como profissional e como pessoa.

🤠Que conselho você daria para alguém que está começando agora no ecossistema SAP e ainda não conhece a comunidade? Não desista dos seus sonhos, e se mantenha sempre desafiado!

📸Um momento especial na comunidade

Foram vários, mas vou deixar uma trajetória para dizer que vale cada esforço!

SAP Inside Track São Paulo - 2023 - Como participante


SAP CWB Xperience 2025 - Ministrando Hands-on


SAP Inside Track Curitiba 2025 - Como Apoiador e Palestrante!




Recentemente como Host de um  SAP Code Jam 2026 mais que especial, com figuras internacionais!

Além das perguntas da série:
1️⃣Quem sou eu na SAP Community Curitiba?
2️⃣O que mais me motiva a continuar fazendo parte da SAP Community Curitiba?
3️⃣Como fazer parte da comunidade impactou minha jornada profissional ou pessoal?

Deixo também uma pergunta adicional:
